title: lastrea bergiana
intro: Lastrea bergiana, also known as the Silver Fern or Golden Fern, is a species of fern in the genus Lastrea. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea bergiana include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea bergiana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
